steps.title: Recognize the series of three deserts
steps.content: This sentence lists three deserts, each with a ranking description. The Chihuahuan's ranking is incomplete at the blank; the Karakum entry occupies the entire blank; and the Taklamakan's entry follows after, introduced by and.

steps.title: Use semicolons to separate series items with internal commas
steps.content:
When items in a series contain commas internally (between name and ranking, like Desert name, ranked number), separate the items with semicolons.

Choice D correctly provides eleventh in size; the Karakum Desert, ranked twelfth; — maintaining the semicolon separators between all three desert entries.

Choices A, B, and C violate this rule by disrupting the parallel structure, omitting separators, or mixing punctuation.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
